title: Update header logo with uploaded white Fons logo

requirements.text: Replace the logo in the Hero section header with the uploaded white Fons logo (PNG FONS LOGO E BARDHE.png)

quotes: yes, only on the head of the webpage

acceptanceCriteria: The Hero section displays the new white Fons logo
The logo maintains appropriate size and positioning in the header
The logo is visible against the background

constraints: Only modify the logo in the Hero/header section, not in the Footer or other locations
nonGoals: Changing logos in the Footer component
